entry.title: FSCM CM: Net Value of the itens from MM origin application
entry.content:
Hy gurus, 

I'd like to know if there is any customizing that I can update objects from MM with NET + TAX amount in FQM_FLOW table.  Nowadays I have only net amount in Cash Flow Analyzer.

Thanks in advance.

Best Regards

Att

RL

entry.title: SAP B1 10.0 Multi-branch Balance Sheets?
entry.content: Is it possible to generate a separate balance sheet for each branch in SAP B1 10.0 in addition to a consolidated balance sheet?

entry.title: Discrepancy Analysis of Cross-currency Balances
entry.content:
First, open the application named "Display Customer Summary China".

 

Next, enter the query conditions to check the balance for December 2024, and it shows that the USD balance is 0.

 

Then, enter the query conditions again to look for the data of January 2025, and the initial balance of USD is displayed as 51.06.

 

 
It can be seen from the above that the balance at the end of December 2024 is inconsistent with the balance at the beginning of January 2025. After further analysis, it is found that the discrepancy is caused by the clearing of accounts between USD and CNY. However, this type of business is a normal operation. The problem is that the current report system is not capable of querying transaction currency balances across different currencies.

entry.title: Delivery block is getting removed automatically when Down Payment request is cleared
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I'm Facing one issue with regards to Down Payment Processing through Milestone billing.

I have created one Sales Order with item category CBAO, entered Billing Plan date and value at Item level and save the order. Then I created a down Payment request through VF01 and then cleared it. But I can't find any Down Payment status either at header or at item level. And the Delivery block is still there, It's not getting removed automatically upon Down Payment clearance.

Could anyone please tell me what could be the possible reasons?

Regards,

Seemita.

entry.title: Depreciations of assets in foreign currency
entry.content:
Dear colleagues, 

I would like to ask whether there is a solution to maintaining depreciation areas in foreign currency that would post the depreciation in other currency other than the one set up for Company Code. 

Current setup - Chart of depreciation has one 01 leading Depreciation area in IFRS and one 10 in GAAP.  Company code currency is PHP, and client needs to do the depreciation in EUR and USD. we tried setting up the parallel currency based on the knowledge article Parallel Currencies in depreciation areas , where based on this article the postings are translated to Free Defined Currency 1 and Free Defined Currency 2, and depreciation areas in EUR and USD are set up as Areas Do not Post,   but this solution is not feasible for the client as they want to lower the acquisition value if in EUR by only in EUR, and this solution gives only overview of the depreciation translated to EUR and the depreciation is done only in PHP.  

 

if acqusition is in EUR document currency and PHP company code currency the provided solution with new depreciation area for EUR give us right amounts for depreciation calculation but without actual posted amounts. The posting of depreciation is still only in leading depreciation area 01 with translation to free defined currencies EUR and USD which is not accepted by customer.

As per my understanding, under one accounting principle there can be only 1 leading depreciation are which posts in real time therefore EUR and USD areas would need to be set up as post depreciation only, here is a catch, the client wants to post the depreciation to the same GL accounts in 01 IFRS PHP and 20 IFRS EUR and 30 IFRS  USD. Ideally client want to choose that if Acquired Assets' document currency is in EUR, and company code currency is PHP, then the posting should be done only  in depreciation area for EUR, where posting of depreciation document currency is EUR and company code currency is PHP. 

Is there any reasonable solution for this? 

Thank you in advance. 

Best regards,

Lenka

entry.title: S_ALR_87012394 can be used with Fiori
entry.content: I would like to know if S_ALR_87012394 is working on Fiori or it's just SAP GUI. Thanks

entry.title: Is there any equivalent app to J3RKKRD / J3RKKRS on SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m currently working on an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud system and looking for equivalent applications to the following on-premise programs:

J3RKKRD – Russia: G/L Account Balance

J3RKKRS – Russia: G/L Account Line Items

I’ve already searched in the Fiori App Library and found some apps that seem to have similar functionality. However, when I checked the Business Catalog listed in the library, I couldn’t find any matching catalogs available in our public cloud system for role assignment.

I would like to ask:

Are there standard apps in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud that are functionally equivalent to J3RKKRD and J3RKKRS?

If yes, what is the Business Catalog associated with them?

If the apps are available in the library but not in our system, is there any way to activate or request them? 

Thanks in advance for your support!

entry.title: How to handle goods lost during transit?
entry.content: We have a scenario where suppliers sent the goods against PO to us but they were lost by logistic partner. However we still need to pay supplier. How to handle this?

entry.title: VAT exchange rate
entry.content:
Hi, domestic invoice is received in foreign currency, invoice needs to have VAT value in local.  Invoice date is not necessarily a match with this VAT f/x rate used in the invoice as it can be based on delivery date.  

Is there a way to solve this in SAP ECC?  There is Note for S/4 Hana public cloud version that I think is suitable but I did not find any for ECC.

entry.title: Help Global System Settings FIN-CS
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

The options:

  • Reclassification: Selection Object in Trigger

  • Validation in SAP S/4HANA

  • Breakdown Category: Selection Object in Maximum Selection

  • Currency Translation: Selection Object

  • Use Item Role Attribute

do not appear in the Global System Settings (Transaction CXB3), and SAP is asking me to change them before upgrading to S/4HANA 2023.

However, I don't understand how to do this, because in Note 3326805, it says to activate these fields, but they do not appear in this transaction (CXB3) . I would like to understand the relevance of this, whether I really need to change it, and how to do so.

Thank you very much!

Attached is how CXB3 appears for me.

entry.title: CJIA report payment issue
entry.content:
We have activated the Project Cash Management feature.

  1. First step - A purchase order was created - with an account assignment category for the project (WBS element) and mandatory down payments on the items of the purchase order.

 

The total purchase order value is €225,000. The amount of down payments to be paid to the supplier for this purchase order is €135,000.

  1. At this point, we have the following values in the CJIA report (Project Actual and Commt Paymt LIs) - there is a total order amount with a value type of 51 “ Purchase order (PO)”. But there is no information at all about the amount of down payments to be paid to the supplier.

  1. Next step - A Down Payment Request was created via ME2DP “Down-Payment Monitoring for PO”.

  1. At this point, the report CJIA (Project Actual and Commt Paymt LIs) displays the amount of the Down payment request with the value type 58 “ Down payment request”. But there is no reduction of the value 51 “ Purchase order (PO)”. And the total amount of expected payments in Project management is incorrect.

Questions:

Why doesn't the CJIA report show the expected down payments that have been completed on purchase order line items?

Why doesn't the Down payment request created from a purchase order reduce the expected payments for that purchase order?

entry.title: F.05 error：File "BANK-202504" is not in the directory area "/tmp/" "(FI_VALUATION)"，message no. SG80
entry.content: Below is the RS11 configurations

entry.title: Responsible Cost Center in WBS element and Project
entry.content:
Hello, when creating a project or a WBS Element, the responsible Cost Center is mandatory. 

I know that based on the entered Cost Center, the Company Code for the project is determined. 
I found that the purpose of maintaining the cost center is to automate settlement rule creation from settlement strategy - here 
But I use SAP S4H Public Cloud edition and in the details of the settlement rule, I can NOT choose any settlement strategy: 

Can this strategy be created in CBC or elsewhere? 

Thank you for clarifying the use of responsible cost center in WBS elements and projects and of the settlement strategy.

entry.title: dunning notice generated but spool is in error
entry.content:
Synopsis

Dunning parameters entered

dunning scheduled done

1dunning notice generated of which 1 to be sent

dunning print out done with LP01 

Spool with pdf tried to open but error "Unable to call Corefunction callREADFILE:SY-SUBRC=16

entry.title: Is it possible to download the DME tree
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is it possible to download the DME tree (tags) from the configuration (100558). If yes, please let me know how we can download it.

 

Thanks & regards,

Kavitha D

entry.title: RFOPENPOSTING_FR functionality
entry.content:
Hello,

Can any one please explian the functionality of RFOPENPOSTING_FR transaction. I understand from the program documentation that is used to create the FEC file and this program posts the opening balance of the closed fiscal year in the next fiscal year.

But does this program post only the closing balances of Customer and Vendor reconciliation account or all the balance sheet GLs?

Any help would be appreciated.

 

Thanks

Prasad Garude.

entry.title: Customers Payment API https://api.sap.com/api/ccpcustpayment/overview
entry.content:
Dear Team 

We are trying to post incoming customer payments via API which should also clear the customer invoices. 

Has someone used this API, can this be used for this requirement. 

https://api.sap.com/api/ccpcustpayment/overview
 
We have already explored the other journalentry APIs, it does he work but there has to be two API calls, 1 for payment and second for clearing but due to a already very high transactions volume we dont want to post two documents

entry.title: 统驭科目记账屏幕放出利润中心/自定义字段
entry.content:
我们公司有些板块，只上总账模块，不上销售和采购模块，但客户/供应商类统驭科目需要按利润中心的维度核算，

1、系统是否可以在APP：创建进项发票、创建销项发票，客商页签增加利润中心维度。

2、在创建客户/供应商凭证API的时候，也能相应的做增加？

3、如果利润中心字段不允许的话，自定义字段是否可以？

entry.title: The transaction ABUMN doesn"t have the input field -Unit of measurement and has an error message
entry.content: Our business can"t to any partial transfer with the transaction ABUMN, as they always get the standard error message "Enter both quantity and unit of measure". Please see the screenshot in the attachment. The problem is not only in FIP, but also in every test and develpment system. Could you please help how to set the field "unit of measure"? Thanks.

entry.title: How can the ledger be configured to display the GST amount consolidated for each invoice?
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP S4HANA Public Cloud, we need to display the GST amount consolidated for each invoice. Could you suggest any required configurations for this?

Thank you.

@Finance  # GST # Report
